pack.name: Home Exterior Seasonal Maintenance
pack.description: Seasonal exterior checks for gutters, siding, drainage, and winter readiness.
pack.author: Home Maintenance Manager

tasks.name: Clean gutters and downspouts
tasks.description: Remove leaves and debris from gutters and verify downspout drainage.
tasks.instructions: Clean gutters safely or hire a professional. Confirm downspouts discharge away from the foundation.

tasks.name: Inspect exterior caulk and penetrations
tasks.description: Check windows, doors, vents, and utility penetrations for gaps.
tasks.instructions: Inspect exterior caulk and sealant. Repair gaps according to material and product directions.

tasks.name: Winterize hose bibs
tasks.description: Prepare outdoor faucets and hoses before freezing weather.
tasks.instructions: Disconnect hoses, shut off interior valves where applicable, drain hose bibs, and install covers if needed.
